current_life_events: The user has been juggling a demanding part‑time job to support their partner who lost employment, while also caring for their father with Alzheimer’s. The past week saw their best friend move abroad, leaving the user feeling increasingly isolated. The user’s workload has intensified with additional responsibilities at work, and they’ve been feeling pulled in multiple directions.
mental_state: The user feels stretched thin, constantly balancing financial obligations, caregiving duties, and personal loneliness. They are trying to keep everything afloat but are beginning to question their capacity to sustain this pace.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The combination of increased work demands, ongoing caregiving responsibilities, and recent social isolation has made the user feel particularly strained, prompting them to seek support today.
